ops.note: Satisfied vacuously-and-verified before the v1.5.0 tag: cc-notes imports NO fusekit-moved package (only root/mountd/content, all surviving the cut) and already owns internal/version with its own ldflags targets — the flip commit is EMPTY by construction.
